why_the_model_may_have_struggled: Geometry: 1529×2000px, aspect ratio 0.76. Laplacian variance ≈ 104.9 (proxy for fine detail / sharpness).

Possible failure story: clean vector-like composition, flat shading, or digital poster aesthetics overlap the training distribution of AI samples.
